message:
fix: doctor --fix reopens closed agent beads instead of recreating

When agent beads were closed by the reaper, doctor --fix tried to CREATE
new ones, which failed on ID collision. Now checks if the bead exists
(even if closed) via bd.Show() and reopens it with status=open.

Logic order: issues table -> open wisps -> closed bead (reopen) -> create new.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2600
Author: ChicK00o (Rohit Bhosle)

Co-authored-by: Rohit Bhosle <mail@rohitbhosle.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
